Body.Content:
This feature saves you time by automatically connecting your meetings to the correct CRM records. You have the right deal insights at your fingertips when preparing for customer conversations, so you can focus less on updating records and more on selling with confidence and context.

GA date: September CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Link meetings to CRM records automatically with AI
